---
pagetitle: "Photos"
body-class: photos-page
page-layout: full
---

<style>
body.photos-page main.content,
body.photos-page #quarto-document-content {
  max-width: none;
}

.photos-shell {
  --photos-width: 930px;
  --photos-gap-x: 1.55rem;
  --photos-gap-y: 1.75rem;

  width: min(var(--photos-width), calc(100vw - 2rem));
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding-top: 0rem;
}

.photos-title {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: "Inter", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
  font-size: 2.05rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.15;
  letter-spacing: -0.025em;
  color: #252a32;
}

.photos-subtitle {
  margin: 0.45rem 0 0;
  color: #4f5965;
  font-family: "Inter", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

.photos-gallery {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: var(--photos-gap-y) var(--photos-gap-x);
  margin-top: 2rem;
}

.photo-card {
  min-width: 0;
  margin: 0;
}

.photo-button {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0;
  border: 0;
  appearance: none;
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 0.8rem;
  background: #f2f2f0;
  box-shadow: 0 0.12rem 0.7rem rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  cursor: zoom-in;
  line-height: 0;
}

.photo-button:hover .photo-image,
.photo-button:focus .photo-image {
  transform: scale(1.025);
}

.photo-button:focus-visible {
  outline: 3px solid rgba(38, 65, 141, 0.45);
  outline-offset: 4px;
}

.photo-image {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: none;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: center;
  transition: transform 180ms ease;
}

.photo-card figcaption {
  margin-top: 0.55rem;
  padding: 0;
  line-height: 1.25;
}

.photo-caption {
  display: block;
  padding: 0;
  font-family: "Source Serif 4", Georgia, Cambria, "Times New Roman", serif;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 450;
  line-height: 1.18;
  color: #3f3f3f;
}

.photo-place {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 0.08rem;
  font-family: "Inter", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  line-height: 1.25;
  letter-spacing: 0.005em;
  color: #707070;
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .photos-gallery {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 620px) {
  .photos-shell {
    --photos-gap-y: 1.3rem;

    width: min(100%, calc(100vw - 1.4rem));
    padding-top: 1.1rem;
  }

  .photos-gallery {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .photo-lightbox {
    padding: 1rem;
  }

  .photo-lightbox-image {
    max-height: 76vh;
  }
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .photo-image {
    transition: none;
  }

  .photo-button:hover .photo-image,
  .photo-button:focus .photo-image {
    transform: none;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="photos-shell">

<h1 class="photos-title">Photos</h1>

<p class="photos-subtitle">
A small collection of photos from my travels.
</p>

<div class="photos-gallery" aria-label="Travel photo gallery">

<figure class="photo-card">
  <button class="photo-button" type="button" data-full="/assets/photos/large/coastline-okinawa-jp.webp" aria-label="Open larger image: Northern Okinawa coastline">
    <img class="photo-image" src="/assets/photos/thumbs/coastline-okinawa-jp.webp" alt="Northern Okinawa coastline" width="1000" height="811" loading="eager" decoding="async">
  </button>
  <figcaption>
    <span class="photo-caption">Northern Okinawa coastline</span>
    <span class="photo-place">Ginama, Okinawa, Japan</span>
  </figcaption>
</figure>

<figure class="photo-card">
  <button class="photo-button" type="button" data-full="/assets/photos/large/sagi-pond-jp.webp" aria-label="Open larger image: Reflections at Sagi Pond">
    <img class="photo-image" src="/assets/photos/thumbs/sagi-pond-jp.webp" alt="Reflections at Sagi Pond" width="1000" height="750" loading="eager" decoding="async">
  </button>
  <figcaption>
    <span class="photo-caption">Reflections at Sagi Pond</span>
    <span class="photo-place">Sagi Pond, Japan</span>
  </figcaption>
</figure>

<figure class="photo-card">
  <button class="photo-button" type="button" data-full="/assets/photos/large/cherry-blossoms-okinawa-jp.webp" aria-label="Open larger image: Spring arrives early in pink">
    <img class="photo-image" src="/assets/photos/thumbs/cherry-blossoms-okinawa-jp.webp" alt="Cherry blossoms in Okinawa, Japan" width="750" height="1000" loading="eager" decoding="async">
  </button>
  <figcaption>
    <span class="photo-caption">Spring arrives early in pink</span>
    <span class="photo-place">Mt. Yaedake, Okinawa, Japan</span>
  </figcaption>
</figure>

<figure class="photo-card">
  <button class="photo-button" type="button" data-full="/assets/photos/large/nakijin-okinawa-jp.webp" aria-label="Open larger image: Evening light through the trees">
    <img class="photo-image" src="/assets/photos/thumbs/nakijin-okinawa-jp.webp" alt="Evening light through the trees in Nakijin, Okinawa, Japan" width="720" height="900" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
  </button>
  <figcaption>
    <span class="photo-caption">Evening light through the trees</span>
    <span class="photo-place">Nakijin, Okinawa, Japan</span>
  </figcaption>
</figure>

<figure class="photo-card">
  <button class="photo-button" type="button" data-full="/assets/photos/large/deer-nara-jp.webp" aria-label="Open larger image: A gentle soul guards the local shrine">
    <img class="photo-image" src="/assets/photos/thumbs/deer-nara-jp.webp" alt="Deer at a shrine in Nara, Japan" width="787" height="900" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
  </button>
  <figcaption>
    <span class="photo-caption">A gentle soul guards the local shrine</span>
    <span class="photo-place">Nara, Japan</span>
  </figcaption>
</figure>

<figure class="photo-card">
  <button class="photo-button" type="button" data-full="/assets/photos/large/blue-mountains-nsw-au.webp" aria-label="Open larger image: Hiking near Wentworth Falls">
    <img class="photo-image" src="/assets/photos/thumbs/blue-mountains-nsw-au.webp" alt="Hiking near Wentworth Falls in the Blue Mountains, New South Wales" width="800" height="1000" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
  </button>
  <figcaption>
    <span class="photo-caption">Hiking near Wentworth Falls</span>
    <span class="photo-place">Blue Mountains, NSW</span>
  </figcaption>
</figure>

<figure class="photo-card">
  <button class="photo-button" type="button" data-full="/assets/photos/large/booti-booti-national-park-nsw-au.webp" aria-label="Open larger image: A quiet curve of coast">
    <img class="photo-image" src="/assets/photos/thumbs/booti-booti-national-park-nsw-au.webp" alt="A quiet curve of coast at Booti Booti National Park, New South Wales" width="1000" height="755" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
  </button>
  <figcaption>
    <span class="photo-caption">A quiet curve of coast</span>
    <span class="photo-place">Booti Booti National Park, NSW</span>
  </figcaption>
</figure>

<figure class="photo-card">
  <button class="photo-button" type="button" data-full="/assets/photos/large/byron-bay-nsw-au.webp" aria-label="Open larger image: Last light over the beach">
    <img class="photo-image" src="/assets/photos/thumbs/byron-bay-nsw-au.webp" alt="Last light over the beach at Byron Bay, New South Wales" width="1000" height="750" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
  </button>
  <figcaption>
    <span class="photo-caption">Last light over the beach</span>
    <span class="photo-place">Byron Bay, NSW</span>
  </figcaption>
</figure>

<figure class="photo-card">
  <button class="photo-button" type="button" data-full="/assets/photos/large/wallis-lake-nsw-au.webp" aria-label="Open larger image: Soft dusk over the lake">
    <img class="photo-image" src="/assets/photos/thumbs/wallis-lake-nsw-au.webp" alt="Soft dusk over Wallis Lake, New South Wales" width="1000" height="750" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
  </button>
  <figcaption>
    <span class="photo-caption">Soft dusk over the lake</span>
    <span class="photo-place">Wallis Lake, NSW</span>
  </figcaption>
</figure>

<figure class="photo-card">
  <button class="photo-button" type="button" data-full="/assets/photos/large/quokka-rottnest-island-wa-au.webp" aria-label="Open larger image: An inquisitive island local">
    <img class="photo-image" src="/assets/photos/thumbs/quokka-rottnest-island-wa-au.webp" alt="Quokka on Rottnest Island, Western Australia" width="800" height="1000" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
  </button>
  <figcaption>
    <span class="photo-caption">An inquisitive island local</span>
    <span class="photo-place">Rottnest Island, WA</span>
  </figcaption>
</figure>

<figure class="photo-card">
  <button class="photo-button" type="button" data-full="/assets/photos/large/outback-road-au.webp" aria-label="Open larger image: Road to the horizon">
    <img class="photo-image" src="/assets/photos/thumbs/outback-road-au.webp" alt="Outback road in Australia" width="1000" height="750" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
  </button>
  <figcaption>
    <span class="photo-caption">Road to the horizon</span>
    <span class="photo-place">Outback, Australia</span>
  </figcaption>
</figure>

<figure class="photo-card">
  <button class="photo-button" type="button" data-full="/assets/photos/large/outback-sunset-au.webp" aria-label="Open larger image: Sunset over open country">
    <img class="photo-image" src="/assets/photos/thumbs/outback-sunset-au.webp" alt="Outback sunset in Australia" width="1000" height="750" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
  </button>
  <figcaption>
    <span class="photo-caption">Sunset over the plains</span>
    <span class="photo-place">Outback, Australia</span>
  </figcaption>
</figure>

</div>

</div>

<div class="photo-lightbox" id="photo-lightbox" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Expanded photo" hidden>
  <button class="photo-lightbox-close" type="button" aria-label="Close enlarged photo">&times;</button>
  <figure class="photo-lightbox-figure">
    <img class="photo-lightbox-image" id="photo-lightbox-image" src="" alt="">
    <figcaption class="photo-lightbox-caption" id="photo-lightbox-caption"></figcaption>
  </figure>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const lightbox = document.getElementById("photo-lightbox");
  const lightboxImage = document.getElementById("photo-lightbox-image");
  const lightboxCaption = document.getElementById("photo-lightbox-caption");

  if (!lightbox || !lightboxImage || !lightboxCaption) {
    return;
  }

  /*
    Move the overlay out of the Quarto content container.
    This prevents the navbar/page stacking context from sitting above the close button.
  */
  if (lightbox.parentElement !== document.body) {
    document.body.appendChild(lightbox);
  }

  const closeButton = lightbox.querySelector(".photo-lightbox-close");
  const photoButtons = document.querySelectorAll(".photo-button");

  let lastFocusedElement = null;

  function escapeHtml(text) {
    return text.replace(/[&<>"']/g, function (character) {
      return {
        "&": "&amp;",
        "<": "&lt;",
        ">": "&gt;",
        '"': "&quot;",
        "'": "&#039;"
      }[character];
    });
  }

  function focusWithoutScrolling(element) {
    if (!element || typeof element.focus !== "function") {
      return;
    }

    try {
      element.focus({ preventScroll: true });
    } catch (error) {
      element.focus();
    }
  }

  function openLightbox(button) {
    const card = button.closest(".photo-card");
    const image = button.querySelector(".photo-image");
    const captionElement = card.querySelector(".photo-caption");
    const placeElement = card.querySelector(".photo-place");

    const caption = captionElement ? captionElement.textContent.trim() : "";
    const place = placeElement ? placeElement.textContent.trim() : "";

    lastFocusedElement = document.activeElement;

    lightboxImage.src = button.dataset.full;
    lightboxImage.alt = image.alt;
    lightboxCaption.innerHTML =
      '<span class="photo-lightbox-caption-main">' + escapeHtml(caption) + '</span>' +
      '<span class="photo-lightbox-place">' + escapeHtml(place) + '</span>';

    lightbox.hidden = false;
    document.body.classList.add("photo-lightbox-open");
    focusWithoutScrolling(closeButton);
  }

  function closeLightbox() {
    lightbox.hidden = true;
    lightboxImage.removeAttribute("src");
    lightboxImage.alt = "";
    lightboxCaption.textContent = "";
    document.body.classList.remove("photo-lightbox-open");

    if (lastFocusedElement) {
      focusWithoutScrolling(lastFocusedElement);
    }
  }

  photoButtons.forEach(function (button) {
    button.addEventListener("click", function () {
      openLightbox(button);
    });
  });

  closeButton.addEventListener("click", closeLightbox);

  lightbox.addEventListener("click", function (event) {
    if (event.target === lightbox) {
      closeLightbox();
    }
  });

  document.addEventListener("keydown", function (event) {
    if (!lightbox.hidden && event.key === "Escape") {
      closeLightbox();
    }
  });
});
</script>
